title: Chapter 1
content:
The article opens with a tidy structure. h1 marks the chapter, p tags carry the prose.

A second paragraph in the first chapter. Quiet, conversational prose.

title: Chapter 2
content:
The second chapter follows the same pattern.

Two paragraphs is enough for the parser to confirm the section boundary.

title: A sub-section
content: Within a chapter, h2 marks sub-sections. The renderer should treat these as inline headings.

title: Chapter 3
content: Final chapter of the test fixture.
